title: [HWAggregateToComb] Crash with structs
body:
A test from snitch. 
```mlir
hw.module private @fifo_v3(in %clk_i : i1, in %rst_ni : i1, in %flush_i : i1, in %testmode_i : i1, out full_o : i1, out empty_o : i1, out usage_o : i1, in %data_i : !hw.struct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>, in %push_i : i1, out data_o : !hw.struct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>, in %pop_i : i1) {
    %true = hw.constant true
    %c-1_i2 = hw.constant -1 : i2
    %c0_i0 = hw.constant 0 : i0
    %c1_i2 = hw.constant 1 : i2
    %c0_i11 = hw.constant 0 : i11
    %c0_i2 = hw.constant 0 : i2
    %0 = hw.bitcast %c0_i11 : (i11) -> !hw.array<1xstruct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>>
    %1 = comb.extract %status_cnt_q from 0 : (i2) -> i1
    %2 = comb.icmp eq %status_cnt_q, %c1_i2 : i2
    %3 = comb.icmp eq %status_cnt_q, %c0_i2 : i2
    %4 = hw.array_get %mem_q[%c0_i0] : !hw.array<1xstruct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>>, i0
    %5 = comb.xor %2, %true : i1
    %6 = comb.and %push_i, %5 : i1
    %7 = hw.array_create %data_i : !hw.struct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>
    %8 = comb.add %write_pointer_q, %true : i1
    %9 = comb.add %status_cnt_q, %c1_i2 : i2
    %10 = comb.xor %6, %true : i1
    %11 = comb.or %10, %8 : i1
    %12 = comb.mux %10, %status_cnt_q, %9 : i2
    %13 = comb.xor %3, %true : i1
    %14 = comb.and %pop_i, %13 : i1
    %15 = comb.add %read_pointer_q, %true : i1
    %16 = comb.add %status_cnt_q, %c-1_i2 : i2
    %17 = comb.xor %14, %true : i1
    %18 = comb.or %17, %15 : i1
    %19 = comb.mux %17, %12, %16 : i2
    %20 = comb.and %push_i, %pop_i, %5, %13 : i1
    %21 = comb.mux %20, %status_cnt_q, %19 : i2
    %22 = comb.xor %flush_i, %true : i1
    %23 = comb.and %rst_ni, %22, %18, %read_pointer_q : i1
    %24 = comb.and %rst_ni, %22, %11, %write_pointer_q : i1
    %25 = comb.xor %rst_ni, %true : i1
    %26 = comb.or %25, %flush_i : i1
    %27 = comb.mux %26, %c0_i2, %21 : i2
    %28 = seq.to_clock %clk_i
    %read_pointer_q = seq.firreg %23 clock %28 : i1
    %write_pointer_q = seq.firreg %24 clock %28 : i1
    %status_cnt_q = seq.firreg %27 clock %28 : i2
    %29 = comb.mux %6, %7, %mem_q : !hw.array<1xstruct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>>
    %30 = comb.mux %rst_ni, %29, %0 : !hw.array<1xstruct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>>
    %mem_q = seq.firreg %30 clock %28 : !hw.array<1xstruct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>>
    hw.output %2, %3, %1, %4 : i1, i1, i1, !hw.struct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>
  }
```
code_blocks:
hw.module private @fifo_v3(in %clk_i : i1, in %rst_ni : i1, in %flush_i : i1, in %testmode_i : i1, out full_o : i1, out empty_o : i1, out usage_o : i1, in %data_i : !hw.struct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>, in %push_i : i1, out data_o : !hw.struct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>, in %pop_i : i1) {
    %true = hw.constant true
    %c-1_i2 = hw.constant -1 : i2
    %c0_i0 = hw.constant 0 : i0
    %c1_i2 = hw.constant 1 : i2
    %c0_i11 = hw.constant 0 : i11
    %c0_i2 = hw.constant 0 : i2
    %0 = hw.bitcast %c0_i11 : (i11) -> !hw.array<1xstruct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>>
    %1 = comb.extract %status_cnt_q from 0 : (i2) -> i1
    %2 = comb.icmp eq %status_cnt_q, %c1_i2 : i2
    %3 = comb.icmp eq %status_cnt_q, %c0_i2 : i2
    %4 = hw.array_get %mem_q[%c0_i0] : !hw.array<1xstruct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>>, i0
    %5 = comb.xor %2, %true : i1
    %6 = comb.and %push_i, %5 : i1
    %7 = hw.array_create %data_i : !hw.struct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>
    %8 = comb.add %write_pointer_q, %true : i1
    %9 = comb.add %status_cnt_q, %c1_i2 : i2
    %10 = comb.xor %6, %true : i1
    %11 = comb.or %10, %8 : i1
    %12 = comb.mux %10, %status_cnt_q, %9 : i2
    %13 = comb.xor %3, %true : i1
    %14 = comb.and %pop_i, %13 : i1
    %15 = comb.add %read_pointer_q, %true : i1
    %16 = comb.add %status_cnt_q, %c-1_i2 : i2
    %17 = comb.xor %14, %true : i1
    %18 = comb.or %17, %15 : i1
    %19 = comb.mux %17, %12, %16 : i2
    %20 = comb.and %push_i, %pop_i, %5, %13 : i1
    %21 = comb.mux %20, %status_cnt_q, %19 : i2
    %22 = comb.xor %flush_i, %true : i1
    %23 = comb.and %rst_ni, %22, %18, %read_pointer_q : i1
    %24 = comb.and %rst_ni, %22, %11, %write_pointer_q : i1
    %25 = comb.xor %rst_ni, %true : i1
    %26 = comb.or %25, %flush_i : i1
    %27 = comb.mux %26, %c0_i2, %21 : i2
    %28 = seq.to_clock %clk_i
    %read_pointer_q = seq.firreg %23 clock %28 : i1
    %write_pointer_q = seq.firreg %24 clock %28 : i1
    %status_cnt_q = seq.firreg %27 clock %28 : i2
    %29 = comb.mux %6, %7, %mem_q : !hw.array<1xstruct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>>
    %30 = comb.mux %rst_ni, %29, %0 : !hw.array<1xstruct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>>
    %mem_q = seq.firreg %30 clock %28 : !hw.array<1xstruct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>>
    hw.output %2, %3, %1, %4 : i1, i1, i1, !hw.struct<tag: i5, sign_ext: i1, offset: i3, size: i2>
  }
